SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
DefaultFieldContext
Default implementation of FieldContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor for each @FieldMeta element it encounters.
DefaultFormContext
Default implementation of FormContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor after all fields of a @FormSpec type have been processed.
DefaultFormContext.Builder
 
FieldContext
Immutable view of a single @FieldMeta-annotated element (field or method) as seen during annotation processing.
FieldTransformer
SPI extension point: transforms a single @FieldMeta-annotated element into a custom DIFSP InputFieldSpec JSON object.
FormContext
Immutable view of a partially-assembled FormSpec, passed to FormContributor.supports(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and FormContributor.additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).
FormContributor
SPI extension point: contributes additional fields and cross-constraints to a FormSpec after all individual elements have been processed.
SpiDispatcher
Loaded once per processor round, this class discovers all registered FieldTransformer and FormContributor implementations via ServiceLoader and dispatches to them during FormSpec generation.
SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Result of a successful field transformation.
